summary: Iteration 5 regression sweep after /input ReferenceError fix. All 13 admin routes render cleanly (no pageerror, no React error boundary, no console.error apart from expected /auth/me 401 on public probes). /input specifically loads without ReferenceError; parse-po-btn and po-upload-input data-testids are present and visible; Mata Uang dropdown shows IDR/SGD/USD; item row inputs (item-name-0/item-qty-0/item-price-0) accept typing; Grand Total (IDR) header + row visible in DOM (uppercase via CSS). RBAC verified: store01 renders /store/* + /so-master + /deliveries cleanly; finance01 renders /store/incoming-report + /master + /; staff01 renders /input with parse-po-btn visible. Backend regression: 86/86 pytest tests still pass (17.09s) — no changes to backend from iter 4.
critical_code_review_comments: InputTransactionPage.jsx: fileInputRef/parsing/sos state + onParsePO handler now correctly declared (lines 170-210) before JSX consumption on line 222+. React no longer crashes.

Suggestion (non-blocking, carried from iter 4): /api/transactions/parse-po still uses get_current_user rather than require_write — any authenticated user (including store/finance) can trigger LLM calls and spend quota. Consider restricting to admin/staff via require_write.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 admin routes + all RBAC routes rendered without errors)

test_credentials: susanto/admin123, staff01/staff123, store01/store123, finance01/finance123 — all working
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests require env var: `export $(grep -v '^#' /app/frontend/.env | xargs)` before running pytest so REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is available. Frontend Playwright sweep pattern: attach pageerror + console 'error' handlers, ignore lines containing '/auth/me' or '401' (expected on unauthenticated bootstrap probes). All 13 admin routes were traversed successfully at iter 5.
rca of the issue: Iter 4 introduced Auto-Read PO UI but a search_replace failed silently for the const declaration block (useRef+parsing+sos+onParsePO). JSX referenced fileInputRef causing full-tree ReferenceError. Main agent's fix (inserting the block at line 170) is verified working via Playwright sweep.
